name: Commonwealth Bank
description_zh: Australia's largest bank, recruiting over 200 graduates each year with graduate streams in technology, data, finance, and more. The bank emphasises digital innovation, with particularly strong opportunities in technology roles.

name: Westpac
description_zh: Australia's oldest bank, offering a two-year graduate program with multiple rotation opportunities. The company values diversity and inclusion, and is open to international graduates.

name: NAB
description_zh: One of the Big Four banks, with particular strength in commercial banking and agricultural finance. The bank has been heavily investing in technology transformation, with notable growth in tech roles.

name: ANZ
description_zh: One of the Big Four banks, with an extensive Asia-Pacific business network. The bank values its Asia-Pacific strategy, and graduates with Chinese language skills and Asian market experience are particularly welcome in the international business division.

name: Macquarie Group
description_zh: Australia's largest investment bank and asset management company, and a global leader in infrastructure investment. Known for high compensation, with graduate starting salaries and bonuses among the highest in Australia's financial sector.

name: Atlassian
description_zh: A global leader in enterprise collaboration software (Jira, Confluence, Trello) and one of Australia's highest-valued tech companies. Known for its engineering culture and flexible remote work, with highly competitive graduate salaries.

name: Canva
description_zh: A globally renowned online design platform with over 170 million users and one of Australia's highest-valued tech startups. The company culture is vibrant and open, in a phase of rapid growth with strong demand for engineering, product, and data talent.

name: REA Group
description_zh: Operator of realestate.com.au, Australia's largest online real estate platform. Known for data-driven product development, the engineering team uses a modern tech stack and offers competitive salaries and equity incentives.

name: Xero
description_zh: A cloud accounting software company leading the Australian SME accounting software market. Recognised for its friendly and inclusive company culture, named a top employer multiple times, and ideal for graduates interested in FinTech.

name: Telstra
description_zh: Australia's largest telecommunications provider, transforming from a traditional telco into a technology company, with major investments in cybersecurity, 5G, IoT, and cloud services. The graduate program covers technology, business, and network engineering streams.

name: BHP
description_zh: One of the world's largest mining companies, with a well-established graduate program offering industry-leading salaries and comprehensive training. The company emphasises technology innovation and sustainability, actively recruiting international talent with engineering and tech backgrounds.

name: Rio Tinto
description_zh: A leading global mining group, with Australian operations mainly concentrated in Western Australian iron ore and Queensland bauxite. The two-year graduate program has recently expanded automation and digitalisation, increasing demand for technology roles.

name: Fortescue
description_zh: Australia's third-largest iron ore producer, actively investing in green hydrogen and renewable energy through Fortescue Future Industries. Creating numerous new roles in clean energy, with strong demand for graduates with engineering and science backgrounds.

name: Woodside Energy
description_zh: Australia's largest independent oil and gas producer, a global leader in LNG, also investing in hydrogen energy and carbon capture. Compensation is highly attractive within the energy sector, with a two-year graduate program featuring multiple rotations.

name: Deloitte Australia
description_zh: One of the global Big Four professional services firms, recruiting hundreds of graduates in Australia each year across business, IT, engineering, and other disciplines. Strong focus on learning and development, making it an excellent platform for building professional experience and networks.

name: PwC Australia
description_zh: One of the global Big Four, with leading market share in audit and consulting. The graduate program offers CPA/CA fee support and systematic training, making it a key option for graduates pursuing careers in professional services.

name: EY Australia
description_zh: One of the global Big Four, with significant recent investment in technology consulting and digital transformation. The company emphasises employee diversity and inclusion, and the graduate program offers CPA/CA support and overseas secondment opportunities.

name: KPMG Australia
description_zh: One of the global Big Four, with a distinctive strength in infrastructure and government consulting. The graduate program emphasises mentoring, with each graduate assigned a dedicated mentor. The firm values talent from diverse backgrounds.

name: CSL Limited
description_zh: A global biotechnology leader specialising in plasma-derived therapies and vaccine development, and Australia's highest-valued healthcare company. With substantial R&D investment, it offers a high-quality career starting point for graduates in biomedical and life sciences.

name: Cochlear
description_zh: The global leader in the cochlear implant market, with products exported to over 180 countries. Driven by technological innovation, the R&D team brings together expertise in electronic engineering, software, and hearing science.

name: Qantas
description_zh: Australia's national airline, with a graduate program covering engineering, business, data, and operations. As one of Australia's most recognised companies, work experience here significantly enhances a resume.

name: Woolworths Group
description_zh: Australia's largest retail company and one of the nation's biggest private employers. The data science, supply chain, and digital teams at head office offer professional development opportunities for graduates, with a well-established training system.

name: AGL Energy
description_zh: One of Australia's largest integrated energy companies, undergoing a comprehensive transition to renewable energy with major investments in wind, solar, and battery storage. Strong demand for engineering and technology talent during the transition period.
